prompt: Review PR #4512 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It adds an inspectable tracer for testing.

assertions.text: Flags the hard cast to *agentTraceWriter that will panic with non-agent writers
Notes that the inspectable tracer skips startup hooks that Start() would run (like AppSec)
Flags FlushSync blocking forever when LLMObs is not running (unbuffered channel with no reader)
